openPositions.title: Open Positions
openPositions.description: Looking for self-motivated Ph.D. and master students to join my group. Senior undergraduate students are also welcome. Please email your CV to zhangzijian@bit.edu.cn.

items.text: Congratulations to Zhiyuan's paper "HKT-SmartAudit: Distilling Lightweight Models for Smart Contract Auditing" accepted by TIFS.
Congratulations to Zhaoqi's paper "Combating Knowledge Corruption in Agent Systems: A Byzantine-Tolerant Secure Collaborative RAG Framework" accepted by WWW.
Congratulations to Xuyang's paper "Hydra: Support Dynamic BFT with Weaker Assumptions and Explicit Request Handling" accepted by IEEE TDSC.
Congratulations to Xuyang's paper "Reputation-Based Leader Election under Partial Synchrony: Towards a Protocol-Independent Abstraction with Enhanced Guarantees " accepted by IEEE INFOCOM.
Congratulations to Yan Wu's paper "Unveiling Ethereum Mixing Services Using Enhanced Graph Structure Learning" accepted by IEEE TDSC.
Congratulations to Zhiyuan's paper "SmartAuditFlow: A Dynamic Plan-Execute Framework for Advanced Smart Contract Security Analysis" accepted by ACM TOSEM.
Paper "Trust in a Decentralized World: Data Governance from Faithful, Private, Verifiable, and Traceable Data Feeds" collaborated with Hefei University of Technology accepted by IEEE TIFS.
Paper "Threshold Signatures with Verifiably Timed Combining and Message-Dependent Tracing" collaborated with Hefei University of Technology accepted by IEEE TIFS.
Congratulations to Zhiyuan's paper "Advanced Smart Contract Vulnerability Detection via LLM-Powered Multi-Agent Systems" accepted by IEEE TSE.
Congratulations to Xuyang's paper "The Deferred Byzantine Generals Problem" accepted by IEEE TIFS.
Congratulations to Zhaoqi's paper "Resisting Poisoning Attacks in Federated Learning via Dual-Domain Distance and Trust Assessment" accepted by IEEE TIFS.
Congratulations to Xuyang's paper "Group BFT: Two-Round BFT Protocols via Replica Grouping" accepted by IEEE TDSC.
Paper "S-RAG: A Novel Audit Framework for Detecting Unauthorized Use of Personal Data in RAG Systems" collaborated with University of Auckland accepted by ACL.
Congratulations to Xuyang's paper "ABSE: Adaptive Baseline Score-based Election for Leader-based BFT Systems" accepted by IEEE TPDS.
